data.title: [HIGH] Missing CSRF Protection on SAML ACS Endpoint
data.description:
## Problem

The SAML Assertion Consumer Service (ACS) endpoint has a TODO comment indicating CSRF token binding is not implemented:

**Location**: `internal/api/samlacs.go:98`

```go
// TODO: Bind CSRF token to the RelayState to prevent CSRF attacks
```

## Impact

* CSRF attacks: Attacker can trick authenticated user into processing malicious SAML assertion
* Session fixation: Attacker can force user to authenticate with attacker-controlled account
* OWASP A01:2021 - Broken Access Control

## Solution

1. Generate cryptographically random CSRF token during SSO initiation
2. Store token-to-session mapping with 120-second expiry
3. Include token in RelayState parameter
4. Validate token on ACS callback (constant-time comparison)

**Effort**: Medium (8-16 hours)
**Blocking**: Yes - required before production

See PRODUCTION_READINESS.md Issue #2 for full details.
